name: Filled Cherry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until well combined.
2. Add eggs to the mixture and beat until incorporated.
3. Gradually add flour, baking powder, and salt, mixing until a smooth dough forms.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 15x11-inch pan.
5. Spread cherry pie filling evenly over the batter.
6. Sprinkle remaining dough mixture over the cherry filling.
7. Prepare the streusel topping by combining sugar and flour in a small bowl.
8. Cut in butter with a pastry blender until crumbly.
9. Stir in chopped walnuts or pecans.
10. Sprinkle the streusel topping evenly over the cake batter.
11. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour, or until set.
This rewritten recipe maintains the original title, ingredients, and instructions while ensuring clarity and consistency throughout.
